sub — APT Repository

Polyglot hacking & utility CLI by Subhadip Sarkar

Install

curl -fsSL https://subhobhai943.github.io/sub/sub.gpg.key \
  | sudo gpg --dearmor -o /etc/apt/keyrings/sub.gpg

echo "deb [signed-by=/etc/apt/keyrings/sub.gpg] https://subhobhai943.github.io/sub stable main" \
  | sudo tee /etc/apt/sources.list.d/sub.list

sudo apt update
sudo apt install sub

GitHub →
